gates.name: Pedestrian/Drone Data Gate
gates.next_fix: Load at least one real pedestrian/drone source.

gates.name: Long-Horizon Gate
gates.next_fix: Cannot claim pedestrian long-horizon world model until this passes.

gates.name: Human/Silver Annotation Gate
gates.next_fix: Need at least 3 gold_human or silver_human_confirmed scenes.

gates.name: Scene Pack Gate
gates.next_fix: Need usable walkable + goal scene packs.

gates.name: Multi-Agent Episode Gate
gates.next_fix: Need 500 multi-agent episodes or mark partial.

gates.name: No Leakage Gate
gates.evidence: train-only candidate goals; no future endpoint input; causal velocity

gates.name: Stage 11 Readiness Gate
gates.next_fix: Pass data, human annotation, scene pack, GoalBench and no-leakage gates.

gates.name: Stage 5C Readiness Gate
gates.evidence: Stage 10 is data/annotation only; latent generative remains forbidden.
